configurations.name: Build, API + Electron
configurations.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; BANANA_OPEN_RUNTIME_WINDOWS=0 BANANA_SKIP_ANDROID_EMULATOR=1 BANANA_COMPOSE_APPS_SERVICES="api react-app" scripts/launch-container-channels-with-wsl2-electron.sh'

configurations.name: Build, API + React-Native[Web]
configurations.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; scripts/compose-apps-down.sh; BANANA_COMPOSE_APPS_SERVICES="api react-native-web" DETACH=1 scripts/compose-apps.sh'

configurations.name: Build, API + React
configurations.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; scripts/compose-apps-down.sh; BANANA_COMPOSE_APPS_SERVICES="api react-app" DETACH=1 scripts/compose-apps.sh'
